description: overall neutral. we briefly used another site but came back
author: alicia R.
pros: I'm easily able to edit the website. the outline they gave us makes it easy
cons: the last rep we had not being able to get back to us in a timely manner

author: Jessica G.
pros: We have a good contact person who is very responsive. It took us a while to try to figure out who to contact for our account since we were contacted by many people initially, but he is great!
cons: We signed up for social media management and never got the service. We paid for several months and did two separate onboarding calls. We call numerous times and eventually asked for a refund for the service not rendered which we never received.

description: Up until now it has been good other than my current account manager and the fact that your team is not always aware of the photos they place that have nothing to do with the content.
author: Carrie D.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] my last Account manager was amazing. We would discuss something and within 4 hours I was getting a confirmation back. This seems to no longer be the case. Very disappointing.
cons: I have a new account manager and he is terrible. The reason we are revamping our Custom site with you is it is that we have two other companies wanting to take over our site because they see you are not helping. I am trying to make chanages that my last account manager [sensitive content hidden] would have jumped at to help. This new guy I am being told to contact customer service. So now I don't want to deal with him at all!

author: Emalie H.
pros: Our website is fully customized to us and patients have an easy time navigating. They work very hard to make sure that everything is exactly how you want it.
cons: A little pricey... but you get what you pay for!

author: Michael B.
pros: I was attracted to Prosites for the ability to edit content when I want rather that waiting months for an administrator to make edits. The business world is a changing environment and you need to update your site at a moments notice.
cons: Add additional templets for a wider choice of page profiles.

description: Overall our experience has been good with good customer service for the website/design.
author: Jessica G.
pros: Prosites is easy to use and make updates as needed. If I am not able to do it myself someone is able to promptly assist me.
cons: We are currently using the SEO and I am never convinced it is really helping.

description: Mediocre at best but too hard to change everything to different manager
author: Safina D.
pros: Website manager easy to use, customer service
cons: Constantly asking for more money to do the same job just apparently in a better way then before, right hand doesn't speak to left hand - very confusing with all the different managers.

author: Samir H.
pros: Run reports, and see progress. SEO rankings
cons: getting help from staff. I call and enroll and it's difficult.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Teresa T.
pros: We’ve been using ProSites for many years. It’s worked fairly well for us.
cons: Problem with Pay Now button on website. ProSites needs to fix this. Another con is the ability to customize—not as much as I would like—especially Home Page.

author: Joel C.
pros: Easy to use and get up and running. Appealing, easy to manipulate, and available to help support.
cons: SEO and PPC programs are not optimized fully
